title: XTREPORTCOLORS
description: Current `ctlseqs` page documents: > “CSI # R > Report number of color registers. > The response is > CSI Pm # Q > where Pm is > 0 if xterm allows colors to be changed dynamically, > 1 if not, > 2 if xterm allows direct-color control, > 3 if xterm allows only color register control, > 4 if xterm does not support sixel graphics, > 5 if xterm supports sixel graphics, > 6 if xterm

title: XTGETXRES
